'''âk-j-y''' ('''kakajay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forebode|forebode]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forebode|forebode]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-j-y
|-
! Lemma
| kakajay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikajay|thikajay]] || [[word:jikajay|jikajay]] || [[word:shikajay|shikajay]] || [[word:kikajay|kikajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukajay|thuthukajay]] || [[word:jujukajay|jujukajay]] || [[word:shushukajay|shushukajay]] || [[word:kukukajay|kukukajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukajay|thukajay]] || [[word:jukajay|jukajay]] || [[word:shukajay|shukajay]] || [[word:kukajay|kukajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukajay|thukajay]] || [[word:jukajay|jukajay]] || [[word:shukajay|shukajay]] || [[word:kukajay|kukajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekajay|thekajay]] || [[word:jekajay|jekajay]] || [[word:shekajay|shekajay]] || [[word:kekajay|kekajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokajay|thothokajay]] || [[word:jojokajay|jojokajay]] || [[word:shoshokajay|shoshokajay]] || [[word:kokokajay|kokokajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokajay|thokajay]] || [[word:jokajay|jokajay]] || [[word:shokajay|shokajay]] || [[word:kokajay|kokajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokajay|thokajay]] || [[word:jokajay|jokajay]] || [[word:shokajay|shokajay]] || [[word:kokajay|kokajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkajay|thĂŠkajay]] || [[word:jĂŠkajay|jĂŠkajay]] || [[word:shĂŠkajay|shĂŠkajay]] || [[word:kĂŠkajay|kĂŠkajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakajay|thathakajay]] || [[word:jajakajay|jajakajay]] || [[word:shashakajay|shashakajay]] || [[word:kakakajay|kakakajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakajay|thakajay]] || [[word:jakajay|jakajay]] || [[word:shakajay|shakajay]] || [[word:kakajay|kakajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakajay|thakajay]] || [[word:jakajay|jakajay]] || [[word:shakajay|shakajay]] || [[word:kakajay|kakajay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakajay|shakajay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakajay|goshakajay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakajay|gokishakajay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakajaynĂŒ|shakajaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakajaynknĂŒ|goshakajaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajaynĂŒ|gokishakajaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakajayshĂ«|shakajayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakajaynkshĂ«|goshakajaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakajayshĂ«|gokishakajayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajayro|shakajayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajaynkro|goshakajaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajayro|gokishakajayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajaymu|shakajaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajaynkmu|goshakajaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajaymu|gokishakajaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakajaysher|shakajaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakajaynksher|goshakajaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakajaysher|gokishakajaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakajayng|shakajayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakajaynkng|goshakajaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakajayng|gokishakajayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakajaya|shakajaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakajaynkya|goshakajaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakajaya|gokishakajaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakajayam|shakajayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakajaynkyam|goshakajaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakajayam|gokishakajayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakajaynĂŒshĂ«|shakajaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakajaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshakajaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakajaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishakajaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajaynĂŒro|shakajaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajaynknĂŒro|goshakajaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajaynĂŒro|gokishakajaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajaynĂŒmu|shakajaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajaynknĂŒmu|goshakajaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajaynĂŒmu|gokishakajaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakajayshĂ«nĂŒ|shakajayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakajaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakajaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakajayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajayshĂ«ro|shakajayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajaynkshĂ«ro|goshakajaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajayshĂ«ro|gokishakajayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajayshĂ«mu|shakajayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajaynkshĂ«mu|goshakajaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajayshĂ«mu|gokishakajayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakajayronĂŒ|shakajayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakajaynkronĂŒ|goshakajaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajayronĂŒ|gokishakajayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakajayroshĂ«|shakajayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakajaynkroshĂ«|goshakajaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakajayroshĂ«|gokishakajayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajayromu|shakajayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajaynkromu|goshakajaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajayromu|gokishakajayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakajaymunĂŒ|shakajaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakajaynkmunĂŒ|goshakajaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajaymunĂŒ|gokishakajaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakajaymushĂ«|shakajaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakajaynkmushĂ«|goshakajaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakajaymushĂ«|gokishakajaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajaymuro|shakajaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajaynkmuro|goshakajaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajaymuro|gokishakajaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
